marketNote: Slovenian consumer insurance is dominated by Triglav, Sava, Generali (which absorbed Adriatic Slovenica in 2019), plus health specialist Vzajemna and smaller players Merkur, Grawe and Wiener Staedtische; the biggest 2024 shift: the old prostovoljno dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje (voluntary supplemental health, ~35 EUR/mo) was abolished 31 Dec 2023 and replaced by a compulsory health contribution (obvezni zdravstveni prispevek, OZP), a flat 35 EUR/mo in 2024 that rose to 37.17 EUR/mo from March 2025, so that classic upsell product is gone and insurers now push discretionary health riders (faster specialist access, dental, surgery, second opinion) instead.
premiumCaveat: All EUR figures are illustrative market-typical ranges for a demo, NOT quotes. Real premiums come from each insurer's calculator and depend heavily on driver age/bonus-malus class, vehicle value/power, postal-code risk (flood/theft/hail), property value and construction, sum insured, deductible (fransiza), and bundling discounts (Triglav up to ~40% bonus + 14% package; Generali package discounts 8-20%). Treat every number as 'profile-dependent'.

providers.note: Market leader. Bundling ('Triglav komplet') stacks discounts; DRAJV telematics app gives safe-driving discount.

products.name: Avtomobilska odgovornost (AO) - obvezno
products.premiumNote: Legally mandatory liability. Profile-dependent; typical annual ~200-450 EUR for a mid-size car depending on bonus-malus class and vehicle power. Priced per year, often paid in installments.
baseCoverage: third-party bodily injury and property damage caused by the insured vehicle
help dealing with the at-fault party's insurer

optionalAddOns.name: AO plus (zavarovanje voznika)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Covers the AT-FAULT driver's own bodily injury/death, which plain AO and kasko do NOT. Worth it for the main driver; redundant if you already have strong personal accident/life cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgodno zavarovanje voznika in potnikov
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Accident payout for driver and passengers. Skippable if occupants already have personal accident cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Zavarovanje avtomobilske in pravne pomoci (asistenca + pravna pomoc)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Roadside assistance + legal help. Useful for older cars / frequent travel; often overlaps with what a kasko package or a credit card already bundles - check before paying twice.

optionalAddOns.name: Rehabilitacija po nesreci
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Rehab costs after a crash. Niche add-on; low priority for most.

products.notes: Bonus-malus: new policy starts around premium class 14; each claim-free year drops one class (bonus up to ~50% of base), each claim jumps three classes.
products.priceCaveat: typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Mandatory third-party liability (AO) itself carries NO deductible for the injured party - the insurer pays the victim in full. A deductible (fransiza) only appears once you add kasko / AO plus modules.
keyExclusions: damage to the at-fault driver's OWN vehicle (that is kasko)
the at-fault driver's own bodily injury unless AO plus is added
intent/gross negligence, driving under the influence, unlicensed driving
racing/track use, war and nuclear events
products.typicalLimits: Statutory minimum sums insured under ZOZP (well into the millions of EUR for bodily injury and for property damage per event); the legal minimums are periodically indexed.

products.name: Avtomobilski kasko (splosni + delni kombinacije)
products.premiumNote: Optional own-damage cover; strongly value-dependent. Full (splosni) kasko can easily add 300-900+ EUR/yr on top of AO for a mid-value car; partial (delni) combos are far cheaper. Recommended mainly for cars up to ~8 yrs or financed/leased vehicles.
baseCoverage: damage to your own vehicle from collision, destruction or theft (incl. electric/hybrid)
covers events outside your control: hail, storm, flood, falling objects, vandalism

optionalAddOns.name: GAP zavarovanje
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Only for leased/credit-financed cars: pays the loan-vs-payout gap if the car is totaled/stolen. Pointless if you own the car outright.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko combos - steklo (glass)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Windscreen/glass breakage. Cheap and popular; genuinely useful. Can be bought standalone without full kasko.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko - kraja (theft)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Theft-only. Matters in higher-theft areas / desirable models; low value for cheap old cars.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko - toca (hail) / parkirisce (parking damage)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Hail and parking-lot dents. Region/lifestyle dependent - hail cover pays off in hail-prone areas.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko - nadomestno vozilo (replacement car)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Courtesy car while yours is repaired. Convenience upsell; skip if you have a second car.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko - osebna prtljaga / kljuci in registrske tablice
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Personal luggage, keys and plates. Small-ticket riders that are easy over-buys for most drivers.

products.notes: Partial-kasko claims do NOT cost you the bonus, unlike full-kasko claims. Delni combos can be assembled a la carte or bought with AO only.
products.priceCaveat: range is the ADD-ON cost on top of AO for a mid-value car; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Full (splosni) kasko is typically written WITH a deductible (fransiza), e.g. a fixed EUR amount or % of the claim; a higher chosen deductible lowers the premium. Partial-kasko perils (glass, etc.) are often deductible-free.
keyExclusions: wear and tear, mechanical/electrical failure not caused by an insured event
damage while driving under the influence or without a valid licence
using the car for racing or hire when not declared
products.typicalLimits: Payout capped at the vehicle's market (actual-cash) value at time of loss, not the purchase price; total-loss settlements deduct salvage value.

products.name: Zavarovanje doma (hisa, stanovanje in oprema)
products.premiumNote: Profile-dependent (property value, size, location, sum insured). Typical basic building+contents ~100-300 EUR/yr; earthquake and flood riders add materially.
baseCoverage: burglary and robbery incl. lock replacement

optionalAddOns.name: Potresno zavarovanje (earthquake)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Earthquake, with a policyholder co-share deductible. Slovenia's most under-insured major risk; genuinely worth it, not a fluff upsell.

optionalAddOns.name: Poplava / vdor vode (flood)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Flood - priced by flood-zone risk. Skip only if your address is verifiably not flood-exposed (Triglav's i.triglav shows the risk).

optionalAddOns.name: Strojelomno zavarovanje naprav / instalacij (machinery breakdown)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Breakdown of appliances/installations (heat pump, boiler, home solar). Useful for expensive built-in tech; over-buy for a basic flat.

optionalAddOns.name: Zavarovanje soncne elektrarne (rooftop solar)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Only relevant if you have rooftop PV; covers damage, breakdown, business interruption, liability.

optionalAddOns.name: Odgovornost zasebnika (private liability)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Personal/family third-party liability, cheaper when added to home policy. High value-for-money; one of the few riders worth actively recommending.

optionalAddOns.name: Zavarovanje za najemodajalce (landlord cover)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Only if you rent the property out.

products.notes: Assistance has a paid 'Asistenca Plus' tier above the included base assistance. Watch per-peril sub-limits (limit kritja).
products.priceCaveat: basic building+contents range; earthquake/flood riders add materially; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Most base perils are deductible-free, but catastrophe riders carry a policyholder co-share: earthquake typically has a co-insurance deductible (odbitna fransiza, e.g. a % of the sum insured per event); flood may use a first-loss limit.
keyExclusions: gradual damage: damp, mould, wear, poor maintenance
earthquake and flood UNLESS the specific rider is bought
damage to a building under construction / not up to code
products.typicalLimits: Watch per-peril sub-limits (limit kritja) and first-loss caps; contents often insured on a 'novo za staro' (new-for-old) basis up to the agreed contents sum.

products.name: Zdravstvena zavarovanja (Specialisti, Zobje, Zdravnik 360, Operacije)
products.premiumNote: These are DISCRETIONARY private health riders, NOT the old supplemental cover (which the OZP replaced in 2024). Profile/age-dependent; typically ~10-30 EUR/mo per module.
baseCoverage: faster access to specialist exams and treatment outside public waiting lists (Specialisti / Specialisti+)

optionalAddOns.name: Zobje in Zobje+ (dental)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Dental treatment cover. Useful if you expect dental work; classic over-sold add-on otherwise.

optionalAddOns.name: Zdravnik 360 (telemedicine / GP access)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Remote doctor / second-opinion. Low cost, convenience buy.

optionalAddOns.name: Operacije (surgery)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Funds private/faster surgery. Consider if long public waits worry you; otherwise skippable.

optionalAddOns.name: Specialisti Nezgoda
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Specialist care specifically after an accident.

products.notes: KEY DEMO POINT: since 1 Jan 2024 the compulsory OZP (35 EUR/mo 2024, 37.17 EUR/mo from March 2025) replaced the old dopolnilno zavarovanje for everyone; anything Triglav sells under 'Zdravje' now is an extra private upsell on top of that.
products.priceCaveat: per-module monthly range, age-dependent; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: These riders usually have no cash deductible; the real 'cost of entry' is a WAITING PERIOD (cakalna doba, often several months to ~1 year) before benefits can be used, plus health questions/exclusions at underwriting.
keyExclusions: pre-existing conditions and treatments already under way at sign-up
care already fully covered by the compulsory system (no double payout)
products.typicalLimits: Each module carries an annual benefit cap and/or a capped number of specialist visits/procedures per year; surgery modules cap the funded procedure cost.

products.name: Zivljenjska zavarovanja (Lajf, za primer smrti, Jesen zivljenja)
products.premiumNote: Term / whole-life, age- and sum-insured-dependent. Wide range.

optionalAddOns.name: Critical illness / accident riders
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Add-ons on the life base; useful for breadwinners, easy to over-stack.

products.notes: Investment-linked variants (i.fleks) blend savings and cover - higher fees, scrutinize.
products.priceCaveat: pure-term monthly indication for a healthy adult; whole-life and investment-linked variants cost far more; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).

providers.note: Second-largest group. 'Nikoli sami' brand line across auto, travel, pet.

products.name: Avtomobilsko zavarovanje (AO + AK + Fleksi kasko)
products.premiumNote: AO mandatory; kasko optional and value-dependent. Profile-dependent, similar market ranges to Triglav.
baseCoverage: AK (avtomobilski kasko): own-vehicle damage from collision, fire, storm, hail, flood, theft, vandalism, animals

optionalAddOns.name: Fleksi kasko (a la carte partial kasko)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Build-your-own kasko - pick individual perils instead of full cover. Good for keeping cost down; the point is to NOT buy perils you don't need.

optionalAddOns.name: Delni kasko kombinacija T-KOMT (theft of vehicle/parts)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Theft of the car or attached parts; must attach to full kasko.

optionalAddOns.name: Pravna zascita (legal protection)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Covers defense costs and pursuing damage claims after an accident. Nice-to-have; overlaps with legal cover you may already hold.

optionalAddOns.name: Kritje odbitne franzize in izgube bonusa (deductible + bonus protection)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Refunds your kasko deductible and protects your bonus when Sava recovers >50% from the at-fault party. Conditional payout - read the fine print before buying.

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgodno zavarovanje oseb v vozilu
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Accident cover for all occupants regardless of who caused the crash.

products.notes: Delni kasko sold both standalone and bundled with AK.
products.priceCaveat: AO band; full kasko adds ~300-900/yr; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: AO liability is deductible-free; AK/full kasko typically carries a chosen deductible (fransiza). Sava's 'kritje odbitne franzize' rider can refund that deductible under set conditions.
keyExclusions: driving under the influence / without a licence
products.typicalLimits: AO to statutory ZOZP minimum sums; kasko capped at market value at time of loss.

products.name: Zavarovanje za tujino (travel)
products.premiumNote: Travel medical/assistance; per-trip or annual. Tiered packages by sum insured. Included here as a common bundled consumer product (not strictly home).

optionalAddOns.name: Annual policy with unlimited trip duration
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Frequent travelers / long stays >92 days; over-buy for one holiday a year.

optionalAddOns.name: Work-abroad risk extension
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Only if you work (not just travel) abroad; added for a surcharge at the agent.

products.notes: Higher sums insured and no time cap in the reworked product.
products.priceCaveat: single-trip from a few EUR; annual multi-trip toward the top of the band; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Some medical-abroad tiers apply a small per-claim deductible; assistance and repatriation are usually deductible-free.
keyExclusions: extreme sports or work-abroad risk unless the extension is bought
treatment that could reasonably wait until return home
products.typicalLimits: Medical sum insured tiered by package (commonly tens of thousands up to unlimited on top tiers); sub-limits on baggage, cancellation, liability.

products.name: Zavarovanje Nase tacke (pet insurance)
products.premiumNote: Optional lifestyle product; tiered by vet-cost sum insured (1000 / 2000 / 4000 EUR). Illustrative of pure add-on selling.
baseCoverage: death/euthanasia of pet from accident: purchase value, vet costs, some liability

optionalAddOns.name: Veterinarski stroski (full vet costs, illness+accident)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Covers full vet treatment up to chosen sum for 12 months; pick sum to match, don't over-insure.

optionalAddOns.name: Odgovornost lastnika (owner liability, worldwide, all breeds)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Third-party damage caused by your pet; the only module valid for all breeds.

optionalAddOns.name: Pravna zascita (legal protection)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Court costs if sued over the pet.

products.notes: Four modules (one base + three optional) - a clean example of modular upselling.
products.priceCaveat: scales with the chosen vet-cost sum (1000/2000/4000 EUR) and pet age; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).

providers.note: Absorbed Adriatic Slovenica in 2019 (so 'Adriatic' policies are now Generali). Loyalty program 'Generali ZAME' gives points/discounts for bundling. Kasko sold as named packages MALI / DELNI / SPLOSNI.

products.name: Avtomobilsko zavarovanje (AO + kasko paketi)
products.premiumNote: Package discounts of 8% (MALI), 20% (DELNI), 10% (SPLOSNI) shown on site. Absolute premium profile-dependent. New policy starts premium class 14; bonus down to 50%, malus up to 200% of base.
baseCoverage: Splosni kasko: own-vehicle damage incl. theft, parking damage, vandalism

optionalAddOns.name: AO-plus (zavarovanje voznika za telesne poskodbe)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Covers the at-fault driver's own injuries - neither AO nor kasko does. Recommended for the main driver.

optionalAddOns.name: Paket DELNI (steklo, svetlobna telesa/ogledala, nadomestno vozilo, kljuci in tablice)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Partial-kasko bundle: glass, lights/mirrors, replacement car, keys/plates. 20% package discount - but includes small riders many don't need.

optionalAddOns.name: Paket SPLOSNI extras (toca, kraja, parkirisce, osebna prtljaga)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Hail, theft, parking, luggage. Region/value dependent; luggage cover is a typical over-buy.

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgoda (potnikov)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Passenger accident cover; skip if occupants have personal accident cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Pravna zascita
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Legal protection module.

optionalAddOns.name: Avto asistenca 24/7
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Roadside assistance home/abroad; check overlap with existing memberships.

products.notes: Delni kasko claims don't cost the bonus and can attach to AO or full kasko; deductible optional but usually taken without.
products.priceCaveat: AO band; package (MALI/DELNI/SPLOSNI) discounts of 8-20% apply; full kasko adds ~300-900/yr; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Liability deductible-free; full kasko sold with an optional deductible (usually taken). Bonus/malus runs class 14 at start, bonus down to 50%, malus up to 200% of base.
products.typicalLimits: AO to statutory ZOZP minimums; kasko capped at market value at time of loss.

products.name: Premozenjsko zavarovanje doma
products.premiumNote: Profile-dependent; base building+contents typically ~100-300 EUR/yr, earthquake/flood extra.

optionalAddOns.name: Potres (earthquake)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Under-insured major risk in Slovenia; worth it.

optionalAddOns.name: Poplava (flood)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Flood-zone dependent.

optionalAddOns.name: Odgovornost / private liability, home assistance
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Liability is high-value; assistance often overlaps.

products.notes: Ex-Adriatic Slovenica property book folded into Generali; bundling earns ZAME points.
products.priceCaveat: base building+contents; earthquake/flood extra; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Base perils largely deductible-free; earthquake carries a policyholder co-share; flood commonly on a first-loss limit.
keyExclusions: earthquake and flood unless the rider is bought
products.typicalLimits: Per-peril sub-limits apply; contents typically new-for-old up to the agreed sum.

products.name: Zdravstvena zavarovanja (Specialisti / private health)
products.premiumNote: Discretionary private health riders (faster specialist access, dental, surgery), NOT the abolished supplemental cover. Age-dependent.
baseCoverage: faster specialist access outside public waiting lists

optionalAddOns.name: Dental / surgery / second-opinion modules
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Buy only the module matching an actual need; easy to over-stack.

products.notes: Same OZP context: since 2024 the compulsory 35 EUR/mo (37.17 from March 2025) OZP replaced the old dopolnilno zavarovanje; Generali's health line is now pure private upsell.
products.priceCaveat: per-module monthly range, age-dependent; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: No cash deductible; entry cost is a waiting period plus underwriting health questions.
keyExclusions: care already fully funded by the compulsory system
products.typicalLimits: Annual benefit cap and/or capped visit count per module; surgery module caps funded procedure cost.

providers.note: Historically THE big supplemental-health insurer (dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje). That flagship product was killed by the 2024 OZP reform, so Vzajemna pivoted to discretionary private health products.

products.name: Dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje (LEGACY - abolished)
products.premiumNote: Historically ~35-40 EUR/mo and near-universal. ABOLISHED 31 Dec 2023. Replaced 1 Jan 2024 by the compulsory OZP: flat 35 EUR/mo in 2024, 37.17 EUR/mo from March 2025, collected via payroll/ZZZS, not an insurer. Include as the canonical 'you no longer choose this' example.
baseCoverage: previously covered the co-payment gap (doplacilo) on public health services, drugs, devices
products.notes: DEMO-CRITICAL: consumers who think they still pay Vzajemna ~35 EUR/mo for dopolnilno are almost certainly now paying the state OZP instead. Any remaining Vzajemna monthly charge is a NEW discretionary product they opted into.
products.priceCaveat: HISTORIC amount only - product abolished 31 Dec 2023, replaced by the state OZP (35 EUR 2024, 37.17 from Mar 2025, 39.36 from Mar 2026). No longer purchasable.

products.name: Specialisti / Specialisti senior / Specialisti in operacije
products.premiumNote: Discretionary private health cover (post-OZP flagship). Age-tiered, senior variant priced higher. Profile-dependent.
baseCoverage: Package A: fast access to specialist exams/diagnostics outside public waiting lists
Package B (nezgoda in bolezen): package A plus specialist treatment needed due to accident/illness

optionalAddOns.name: Operacije (surgery module)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Adds funded private/faster surgery on top of specialist access.

optionalAddOns.name: Specialisti senior
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Older applicants; higher premium tier.

optionalAddOns.name: Free assistance for arranging care
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Bundled concierge to book services - included, not a paid rider.

products.notes: This is what Vzajemna now sells instead of the old supplemental cover.
products.priceCaveat: senior tier priced higher; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: No cash deductible; waiting period and health underwriting apply, and the senior variant is priced by age band.
keyExclusions: services already fully covered by the compulsory system
products.typicalLimits: Annual caps per package (A: exams/diagnostics; B: adds treatment); surgery module caps funded procedure cost.

providers.note: Smaller insurer; strong online self-service. 'Merkur Dom' is its flagship modular property product with clear tiered packages.

products.name: Merkur Dom (premozenjsko zavarovanje)
products.premiumNote: Sold in tiered packages; uses 'prvi riziko' (first-loss) limits, e.g. flood on contents capped at an agreed limit like 8.000 EUR. Profile-dependent.

optionalAddOns.name: Higher-tier package perils (compare tables)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Upper packages add perils/limits; the demo lesson is to match package to actual risk, not auto-take the top tier.

optionalAddOns.name: Poplava na prvi riziko z izbranim limitom (flood, first-loss limit)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Flood cover with a chosen payout cap (e.g. 8.000 EUR) - pick the limit to your exposure; don't over-insure or under-insure.

optionalAddOns.name: Potres (earthquake)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Earthquake extension; recommended given Slovenian seismic risk.

products.notes: First-loss ('prvi riziko') means you agree a max payout up front - a good teaching example for 'what limit do I actually need'.
products.priceCaveat: tiered packages; flood/earthquake on first-loss limits add cost; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
products.deductibleNote: Uses 'prvi riziko' (first-loss) limits rather than classic deductibles on several perils - you agree a max payout (e.g. flood on contents capped at ~8.000 EUR); earthquake extension carries a co-share.
keyExclusions: gradual damage, damp, wear, poor maintenance
earthquake/flood beyond the chosen first-loss limit or unless the extension is bought
products.typicalLimits: First-loss caps per peril (e.g. flood contents ~8.000 EUR); higher packages raise limits/perils - match the limit to real exposure.

products.name: Merkur premozenjsko / nezgodno / zdravstveno / zivljenjsko / turisticno
products.premiumNote: Full consumer line across property, accident, health, life, travel. Profile-dependent.
baseCoverage: accident cover valid at home/work/leisure worldwide (nezgodno)
discretionary private health, life and travel modules

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgodno zavarovanje riders
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Accident payout add-ons; check overlap with life/health cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Zdravstveno (private health)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Post-OZP discretionary health cover - same 'extra on top of state OZP' logic as the big insurers.

products.notes: Merkur zavarovalnica is separate from the old Merkur retail brand; verify entity when matching a user's statement.
products.priceCaveat: per-module, spans accident/health/life/travel; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).

providers.note: Austrian-owned insurer (GRAWE group, S&P 'A'), 30+ years in Slovenia. Full private line under 'GRAWE AVTO', 'GRAWE DOM', 'GRAWE ZIVLJENJE'. Smaller share than the big three; strong on life/savings.

products.name: GRAWE AVTO (avtomobilsko zavarovanje: AO + kasko)
products.premiumNote: AO mandatory; kasko optional. Covers cars, motorbikes, caravans, motorhomes, small trucks and tractors. Package-based. Profile-dependent, market-typical ranges.
products.priceCaveat: AO band; full kasko adds ~300-900/yr; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: Kasko: own-vehicle damage from collision, fire, theft, natural events, vandalism

optionalAddOns.name: Delni / splosni kasko
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Own-damage cover; full kasko for newer/financed cars, partial (glass, theft, natural events) to keep cost down.

optionalAddOns.name: Zavarovanje voznika in potnikov (driver/passenger accident)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Accident payout for occupants; skip if they already hold personal accident cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Asistenca (roadside assistance)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Breakdown/travel help; check overlap with AMZS membership or a credit-card benefit before paying twice.

products.deductibleNote: AO liability deductible-free; full kasko normally carries a chosen deductible (fransiza) that trades premium for out-of-pocket at claim time.
products.typicalLimits: AO to statutory ZOZP minimums; kasko capped at market value at time of loss.

products.name: GRAWE DOM (premozenjsko zavarovanje doma)
products.premiumNote: Building + contents cover for house/flat. Profile-dependent (value, size, location, sum insured).
products.priceCaveat: base building+contents; earthquake/flood riders add materially; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).

optionalAddOns.name: Potres (earthquake)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Slovenia's most under-insured major risk; genuinely worth it, carries a policyholder co-share.

optionalAddOns.name: Poplava (flood)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Flood-zone dependent; skip only if the address is verifiably not flood-exposed.

optionalAddOns.name: Odgovornost zasebnika (private liability)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Family third-party liability, cheap when added to the home policy; high value-for-money.

products.deductibleNote: Base perils largely deductible-free; catastrophe riders (earthquake/flood) carry a co-share or first-loss limit.
keyExclusions: earthquake and flood unless the rider is bought
products.typicalLimits: Per-peril sub-limits; contents typically new-for-old up to the agreed sum.

products.name: GRAWE ZIVLJENJE (klasicna + naloznbena zivljenjska zavarovanja)
products.premiumNote: Life/savings is GRAWE's core strength: classic risk-and-endowment life plus fund-linked variants. Age- and sum-insured-dependent.
products.priceCaveat: pure-term monthly indication for a healthy adult; endowment and fund-linked variants cost more and carry fees; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: endowment (za primer smrti in dozivetja) pays out on survival too

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgodni / critical-illness riders
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Add-ons on the life base; useful for breadwinners / loan cover, easy to over-stack.

optionalAddOns.name: Naloznbeno zivljenjsko (fund-linked)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Blends cover with investing; higher fees, scrutinize vs a plain fund + term policy.

products.notes: GRAWE positions life/savings as its differentiator; compare total fees on fund-linked variants.

products.name: GRAWE nezgodno in zdravstveno / turisticno
products.premiumNote: Accident, discretionary private health and travel modules rounding out the private line. Post-OZP health is an extra on top of the state contribution.
products.priceCaveat: per-module, age-dependent; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: discretionary private health and travel modules

optionalAddOns.name: Nezgodno zavarovanje
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Accident payout; check overlap with life/health cover.

optionalAddOns.name: Zdravstveno (private health)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Faster specialist access on top of the state OZP - same 'extra on top of compulsory' logic as the big insurers.

products.notes: Same OZP context: the compulsory contribution (39.36 EUR/mo since Mar 2026) already funds core care; this line is discretionary.

providers.provider: Wiener Staedtische (podruznica v Ljubljani, Vienna Insurance Group)
providers.note: Vienna Insurance Group branch, operating in Slovenia since 2004. Offers ALL life and property insurance EXCEPT motor-vehicle and credit insurance - so NO car product here. Strength is life, annuity/pension and fund-linked savings.

products.name: Zivljenjska zavarovanja (za primer smrti in dozivetja / za primer smrti)
products.premiumNote: Classic life: pure death cover and endowment (death + survival). Death-only variant marketed for people with large loan obligations. Age- and sum-insured-dependent.
products.priceCaveat: pure-term monthly indication for a healthy adult; endowment variants cost more; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: endowment variant also pays on survival to term

optionalAddOns.name: Multi Protect (funkcionalna nezmoznost / disability)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Payout on functional disability; useful for income protection, redundant if you hold strong disability cover.

products.notes: Death-only cover is pitched specifically as loan/mortgage protection.

products.name: Rentna zavarovanja (annuity / pension)
products.premiumNote: Retirement-income / annuity products for a supplementary pension. Contribution- and term-dependent.
products.priceCaveat: savings vehicle, not a risk premium - 'cost' is really the contribution you choose plus fees; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: accumulates a fund paid back as a regular annuity / lump sum in retirement

optionalAddOns.name: UFOS Premium / Hybrid Invest (fund-linked)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Combines classic guarantee with fund upside (single or regular premium); scrutinize total fees vs a plain fund + term policy.

products.notes: Positioned for 'third-life-phase' planning; compare fees against pillar-3 pension options.

products.name: Premozenjsko zavarovanje (stanovanjska nepremicnina + oprema)
products.premiumNote: Home building (foundations, walls, roof, installations) plus contents (furniture, appliances, valuables/collections). Profile-dependent.
products.priceCaveat: base building+contents; catastrophe riders add cost; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: household contents incl. valuables up to agreed sum
fire, storm, water escape, burglary, glass

optionalAddOns.name: Potres / poplava (earthquake / flood)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Catastrophe riders; earthquake worth it in seismic Slovenia, flood is zone-dependent, both carry co-share/first-loss.

optionalAddOns.name: Odgovornost (private liability)
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Family third-party liability; cheap add-on, high value-for-money.

products.deductibleNote: Base perils largely deductible-free; earthquake/flood carry a policyholder co-share or first-loss limit.
keyExclusions: earthquake and flood unless the rider is bought
products.typicalLimits: Per-peril sub-limits; contents new-for-old up to the agreed sum, with sub-caps on jewellery/valuables/collections.

products.name: Nezgodna zavarovanja (accident)
products.premiumNote: Personal and family accident cover (injury/disability/death from accident). Not health-service cover - a cash-benefit accident product.
products.priceCaveat: per-person, sum-insured-dependent; typical range, real premium is quote-dependent (age, bonus-malus, vehicle, postcode, sum insured, deductible).
baseCoverage: lump-sum payout on accidental death or permanent disability
optional daily allowance / treatment cost benefits

optionalAddOns.name: Family cover extension
optionalAddOns.whoNeedsIt: Adds spouse/children; check overlap with employer or other accident cover.

products.notes: Wiener Staedtische offers no private medical-access ('Specialisti'-style) product and no car insurance in Slovenia.

publicCoverBaseline.note: What a Slovenian resident already has WITHOUT any private insurance. Use this to stop double-buying: most 'health insurance' a consumer thinks they need is already covered by the compulsory system, and the classic dopolnilno upsell no longer exists.

obveznoZdravstvenoZavarovanje.name: Obvezno zdravstveno zavarovanje (compulsory health insurance via ZZZS)
obveznoZdravstvenoZavarovanje.whoHasIt: Every resident with a legal basis: employees, self-employed, pensioners, dependent family members, registered unemployed, etc. Administered by ZZZS.
covers: GP, specialist, hospital and emergency treatment within the public system
prescription drugs on the positive/intermediate list
maternity and childbirth; full-scope treatment for children and students up to age 26
preventive and systematic exams, screening programmes, mandatory vaccinations
treatment of listed chronic and serious illnesses, home nursing (patronaza), listed medical devices
since 1 Jan 2024, via the OZP, the co-payment (doplacilo, 10-90% of service value) that dopolnilno zavarovanje used to cover is now covered too - there is no co-payment gap left to insure

ozp.name: Obvezni zdravstveni prispevek (OZP) - compulsory health contribution
ozp.whatItIs: Flat compulsory monthly contribution introduced 1 Jan 2024 that replaced the abolished prostovoljno dopolnilno zdravstveno zavarovanje. Collected via payroll / ZPIZ / employment office alongside other ZZZS contributions, NOT sold by a private insurer. Together with existing contributions it funds 100% of compulsory-insurance services.
ozp.adjustment: Re-indexed once a year on 1 March to average gross-wage growth (SURS).
ozp.demoPoint: If a consumer thinks they still pay ~35-37 EUR/mo to Vzajemna/Triglav/Generali for 'dopolnilno', they almost certainly now pay this state OZP instead; any remaining monthly charge to a private insurer is a NEW discretionary product they opted into. NOTE: prose elsewhere in this file cites 37.17 EUR/mo, which was correct for Mar 2025-Feb 2026; the current amount since Mar 2026 is 39.36 EUR/mo.

notCoveredGap.note: What compulsory cover does NOT give you - this is exactly what private health riders target. Everything a consumer buys on top of the OZP is discretionary.
gaps: waiting lists: compulsory cover pays for the treatment but not for jumping the public queue; private 'Specialisti' riders buy faster access outside waiting times
self-pay / private specialists and clinics outside the public network

adult dental beyond basics: most adult dental prosthetics/work are limited (white fillings become free for everyone only from 1 Jul 2026; today mainly free for under-15s, pregnant and breastfeeding women)
elective or faster private surgery and second-opinion services
higher comfort (private room, choice of doctor) and treatments/devices outside the covered list
